events.title: Pongal Celebration
events.description: Join us for a vibrant Pongal Celebration event. Celebrate the harvest season with our alumni community!

events.title: Annual Alumni Meet
events.description: Network with fellow alumni and celebrate our shared memories at the annual reunion.

events.title: Tech Talk: AI in 2026
events.description: An insightful session on the future of AI and its impact on various industries.

events.title: MAMCET Hackathon
events.description: Compete with the brightest minds and showcase your coding skills in our annual hackathon.

jobs.title: Administrative Assistant
jobs.description: Join our administrative team! Responsibilities include managing schedules, coordinating meetings, and supporting multiple departments.

jobs.title: Marketing Specialist
jobs.description: We're looking for a creative marketing professional to drive our digital campaigns and brand growth.

jobs.title: Software Engineer (React)
jobs.description: We are seeking a talented React developer to build scalable web applications and improve user experiences.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Help us turn data into actionable insights. Proficiency in SQL and data visualization tools required.

jobs.title: UX Designer
jobs.description: Create intuitive and beautiful user interfaces for our global clients.

messages.lastMessage: Hey! How have you been? Let's catch up soon!
The project looks great. I'll review it tonight.
Thanks for the referral! The interview went well.
Can you share the PPT for tomorrow's meeting?
Great seeing you at the event yesterday!
